rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture while inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in component type scopes and implementation annexes in implementation scopes
generic_rules: Maintain annex scope boundaries to avoid unintended symbol visibility
Do not assume AADL properties are automatically available as AGREE variables
Use explicit typed ports or constants for AADL properties in AGREE expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};`
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings like assignments
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions or guarantees referring to subcomponent ports in component type scopes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
